description: Create a two-column content slide on society predictions with a left text prompt and a right horizontal stacked bar chart comparing likely vs unlikely responses plus 2023 likely reference values.

header.headline: Society
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

left.body: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024

labels: The level of immigration into [COUNTRY] will increase
Women will be paid the same as men for the same work
The total population size of [COUNTRY] will fall
People in [COUNTRY] will become more tolerant of each other
It will become normal for businesses in my country to implement a four-day working week
right.title: Global averages
